prestazioni: Supercharger upgrade to a Magnuson TVS2650 (engine code: SRT 6.2L HEMI V8 - *Demon-derived supercharged variant*) with a 3.09" pulley (stock: 2.75") and supporting fuel system modifications including dual Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pumps, Injector Dynamics ID1050x injectors, and a Fore Innovations F2-1000 fuel pressure regulator to handle the increased airflow (targeting ~950-1000 WHP on E85).

Full exhaust overhaul with a custom 3.5" stainless steel X-pipe (replacing the restrictive factory H-pipe) paired with Borla S-Type cat-back mufflers (part #140698) and long-tube headers from American Racing Headers (part #ARH-100108) with 1-7/8" primary tubes and 3" merge collectors, retaining the factory catalytic converters for emissions compliance while reducing backpressure by ~30%.

Suspension and drivetrain reinforcement with a BMR Suspension 3-point subframe connector kit (part #BMR-SFC027), QA1 double-adjustable coilovers (part #QA1-DODGE-2) with 400 lb/in front springs and 350 lb/in rear springs, and a Getrag TR-6060 transmission reinforcement package from RPM Transmissions (part #RPM-TR6060-UPG) including a billet input shaft, upgraded synchros, and a carbon fiber driveshaft to handle the increased torque.
estetica: Widebody conversion using the Dodge Performance Parts (DPP) Hellcat Redeye Widebody kit (part #P5155864) with custom matte black vinyl wrap (3M 2080-G12) and aggressive front splitter from Anderson Composites (part #AC-041021) featuring a 3-piece carbon fiber design with adjustable dive planes for increased downforce.

Custom forged wheels from HRE Performance Wheels (model: HRE FF15 20x11 ET15 front, 20x12 ET45 rear) in a satin bronze finish, paired with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (305/30/20 front, 325/30/20 rear) for maximum grip, and Baer 6P calipers (part #BAER-6P-14) with 15" two-piece rotors for improved braking performance.

Engine bay aesthetics featuring a custom carbon fiber supercharger cover from Seibon Carbon (part #SEI-DOD-HEMI-SC) with a clear-coated finish, a Moroso aluminum radiator support cover (part #MOR-63910), and a custom billet aluminum strut tower brace from BMR Suspension (part #BMR-SB001) with a brushed finish and laser-etched Hellcat Redeye logo.
